title: Excalibur | Torchmaster
description: A support pack for Excalibur that re-textures the items from Torchmaster to match the Excalibur aesthetic
body:
This support pack for the amazing Excalibur resourcepack re-textures the following items from Torchmaster to be more in line with the visual asthetic of Excalibur:

- Mega Torch
- Dread Lantern
- Feral Flare Lantern

![excalibur_torchmaster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb709b625bf7dbb72a8420efbf8ba0726e883e7.jpeg)

Credits:

- Maffhew: Excalibur 
- Xalcon: [Torchmaster](https://modrinth.com/mod/torchmaster)
  
Special credit to Excalibur Discord user Crowthen who re-textured the models.  I simply bundled the assets into the resource pack. 

Installation:

Launch Minecraft and click on "Options"

Click on "Open Resource Pack Folder"

Drag the Excalibur_Torchmaster.zip file into the resource pack folder

Move the Excalibur Torchmaster resource pack from the left column to the right

Make sure that the support pack is placed above the original Excalibur resource pack and the Clarent support pack if installed

Select "Done"
